race.comment: Another tough one and a few chances have come out to further complicate things. ZENTORNO (1) won well two back at short odds, solid again in Adelaide in tough ground last time. He'll be hard to hold out for the in form Payne yard. TAN TAT DELIGHT (11) has been good in two runs back and is ready to peak up to 1400m, out of a fast race last time at this track when chasing well. BALTIC BLIZZARD (12) is a lightly raced filly who won her maiden dominantly fresh at Ballarat, well in contention up in grade last time when not having the best of runs. She can bounce back strongly here with just 54kg after the claim. PINOT FOR MIKE (13) is building towards a win this time in, getting home well into third at Bendigo latest. She'll be running on late.

favourite.name: Tan Tat Delight
favourite.owners: M F Tung, Mrs P K C Tung, Ms W M Tung & Ms W Y Tung
